title: Eternal Evolution
definition: The constant change and progression of life, with nothing remaining static or unchanging.

difficulty_levels.beginner: The constant change and progression of life, with nothing remaining static or unchanging.
difficulty_levels.intermediate: The constant change and progression of life, with nothing remaining static or unchanging.
difficulty_levels.expert: In the dance of existence, each step is a new chapter in an ever-unfolding story.
